aries.archetype: You're the Initiator — the spark that turns a standstill into motion before anyone else has finished debating.
aries.this_year_question: Where would decisive action serve you better than waiting for the perfect moment?

taurus.archetype: You're the Builder — patient, sensory, and quietly unshakeable once your roots go down.
taurus.this_year_question: What is worth holding onto, and what comfort is quietly holding you back?

gemini.archetype: You're the Messenger — curious, quick, and happiest when ideas are moving between people.
gemini.this_year_question: Which conversation, if you finally started it, would change the most for you?

cancer.archetype: You're the Nurturer — tuned to the emotional weather of every room you walk into.
cancer.this_year_question: Where are you caring for everyone but yourself, and what would change if you reversed that?

leo.archetype: You're the Performer — warm, generous, and made to be seen doing what you love.
leo.this_year_question: What would you create this year if you trusted that your light was already enough?

virgo.archetype: You're the Craftsperson — precise, devoted, and able to find the one detail that makes the whole thing work.
virgo.this_year_question: Where is 'good enough' actually the wiser, kinder standard right now?

libra.archetype: You're the Diplomat — drawn to balance, beauty, and the fairness most people only talk about.
libra.this_year_question: Whose approval are you weighing more heavily than your own clear preference?

scorpio.archetype: You're the Alchemist — unafraid of depth, and able to turn what others avoid into power.
scorpio.this_year_question: What are you ready to release so something truer can take its place?

sagittarius.archetype: You're the Explorer — restless for meaning, allergic to the cage of someone else's small story.
sagittarius.this_year_question: Which belief have you outgrown, and where is your next real horizon?

capricorn.archetype: You're the Architect — strategic, durable, and quietly building something that will outlast the moment.
capricorn.this_year_question: Are you climbing your own mountain, or one you were simply handed?

aquarius.archetype: You're the Visionary — wired to see the system everyone else mistakes for the way things must be.
aquarius.this_year_question: Where could your independence make room for the people who actually get you?

pisces.archetype: You're the Dreamer — porous, imaginative, and fluent in the things that can't quite be said.
pisces.this_year_question: What boundary would protect your gift instead of dimming it this year?
